name: io.github.the-nexus-guard/aip-mcp-server
title: AIP Identity MCP Server
description: Cryptographic identity for AI agents: verify DIDs, check trust, sign content, encrypted messaging.

environmentVariables.description: Path to AIP credentials JSON file (optional, defaults to ~/.aip/credentials.json)
environmentVariables.name: AIP_CREDENTIALS_PATH

tools.name: aip_whoami
tools.description: Show your current AIP identity (DID, public key)

tools.name: aip_verify
tools.description: Verify another agent's identity via challenge-response

tools.name: aip_trust_score
tools.description: Get trust score and vouch chain for an agent

tools.name: aip_sign
tools.description: Cryptographically sign content to prove authorship

tools.name: aip_verify_signature
tools.description: Verify a signature against a DID's public key

tools.name: aip_send_message
tools.description: Send an encrypted message to another agent
